subject: english
text:
Today we are witnessing good progress in the software sector but almost all of the hardware is
imported. Can we rise  higher on the value scale there? Can India design an operating system that will
become a household name in the world of computers?
Our exports consist to a large extent of low value raw materials such as iron ore and alumina. Can we
not convert these into a wide range of products that find an international market? We have hundreds of
defence production industries but why does India not
manufacture and market the main battle tank, missiles, aircrafts, guns and other defence equipment? We
have the most important core competence in the form of our multifaceted manpower and basic
infrastructure. What is it that we don't have?
A) What are we witnessing today?
B) What does our exports consist of?

subject: english
text:
Read the passage and answer the questions. 
The panchayat was held under the old banyan tree. Jumman stood up and said, “The voice of the
Panch is the voice of the God. Let my aunt nominate the headpanch. I will abide by her decision.” “I
nominate Algu Chowdhary as the Panch. The Panch knows neither enemy nor friend” stated the old lady.
“Fine,” replied Jumman hiding his Joy over this unexpected piece of luck. “Chachi you are aware of my
friendship with Jumman,” said Algu. “Yes, but I also know that you will not kill your conscience for the
sake of friendship. God lives in the heart of the panch, and his voice is the voice of the God.” And the old
lady explained her case.
A) Where was the panchayat held?
B) Whom did aunt nominate as headpanch?
c)Who lives in the heart of panch?
d)Who explained the case?

subject: english
text:
Aruna Asaf Ali's first political involvement was during the Salt Satyagraha. Due to addressing the public
meeting and leading procession, she was arrested by the police and was sent to Jail for one year .She was
released because public agitation was launched in her support. She was arrested again and put in jail. There
she went on hunger strike to protest against the torture given to the political prisoners. Her demands were
conceded but she was kept in another jail for 10 years in 1942. The Bombay congress session held .In the
session a resolution was passed . The committee had to planned to hoist the tricolour at Gowalia tank
maidan.
The British somehow came to know the plan and arrested prominent leaders including Gandhiji and
Maulana Azad. The Congress President was to unfurl tricolour at the public gathering at Gowaliya tank
maidan.
Answer the questions :

text:
Why was Aruna Asaf Ali released?
2 .Aruna Asaf Ali was a brave freedom fighter who played a key role in India’s struggle for independence.
She is best remembered for hoisting the Indian national flag at the Gowalia Tank Maidan in Bombay during
the Quit India Movement in 1942. Despite facing imprisonment and hardships, she continued her fight for
the nation’s freedom. After independence, she worked for social welfare and was awarded the Bharat Ratna
posthumously.
